source: Big Valley Band of Pomo Indians
key_finding: Ten of eleven monitoring years had Danger-level microcystin at ≥1 location. Six of those ten were in the Lower Arm. All peak values exceeded the Danger trigger (20 µg/L) by at least 10×, most by 100–1,000×.

arm_risk_summary_summer_2024.Lower: 94% of sampling events above Caution; highest absolute toxin levels
arm_risk_summary_summer_2024.Oaks: 79% above Caution; more Danger-level events than other arms
arm_risk_summary_summer_2024.Upper: 31% above Caution; generally lower but elevated at several sites
